problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
